attributes.action: Reduce the scope of plans to renovate the Palace of Westminster
attributes.additional_details: Parliament alone has the power to decide how the palace is renovated.
attributes.background: The latest plans for the renovation of the Houses of Parliament are excessive and wasteful. Whilst repairs and restoration are beyond needed, safeguarding the building should be the priority. Beyond that expenditure should be minimal.

rejection.details: Your petitions isn't clear about in what way you want the scope reduced.  As things stand, it is also already the case that Parliament alone has the power to make a decision upon future renovation plans.
